SessionName.comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.

systemSupplierIdentifier.comment: Name and address information of the supplier.

vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber.comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

RoutineControlType.comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

MemoryAddress.16bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

MemoryAddress.24bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

MemoryAddress.32bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

MemorySize.8bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

MemorySize.16bits.comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

IOCTL.DataIdentifier.comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

RoutineIdentifierList.comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.

RoutineIdentifier.comment: Routine identifier received in the reply of the RoutineControl request

OutputPermanentControlList.comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.

lists.1: Repairing Needed - Orange Warning Lamp - Service Warning

lists.0: Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
lists.1: All  faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
lists.2: All  faults reports and alerts are enabled

lists.8: Wind Back - Release to Fully Released
Wind Back - Release to Fully Released

lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
lists.101: signal has too few transitions / events
lists.102: signal has too many transitions / events
lists.130: alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.151: Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

DTCExtendedData.Mileage.comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.0: No Engine Stop Requested by Driver
lists.1: Nominal Engine Stop Requested by Driver

lists.0: Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
lists.1: All  faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
lists.2: All  faults reports and alerts are enabled

lists.15: not available (init or lever switched failure)

lists.0: Driver safety belt reminder : No Warning
lists.1: Driver safety belt reminder Warning level 1
lists.2: Driver safety belt reminder  Warning level 2

lists.0: Checksum of the configuration data not correct

lists.8: Wind Back - Release to Fully Released
Wind Back - Release to Fully Released

lists.1: Parking Brake Not Tightened warning display request
Brake pedal request message to display
lists.3: Brake pedal request message re-emission request

lists.1: Parking Brake Not Tightened warning display request

lists.3: Tightened request unavailable warning re-emission request

lists.1: Brake pedal request message to display
lists.3: Brake pedal request message re-emission request

DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter.comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

lists.2: No engine stop requested by driver on disconnected 12V battery
lists.5: Engine stop requested by driver on disconnected 12V battery

lists.2: AT park position command not engaged

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

lists.3: Tightened request unavailable warning re-emission request

APBManualApplyCounter.comment: Number of all Manual apply actuation

APBApplyCounterLess5.comment: Number of all apply actuation with a slope below 5%

APBApplyCounterLess10.comment: Number of all apply actuation with a slope between 5% and 10%

APBApplyCounterLess20.comment: Number of all apply actuation with a slope between 10% and 20%

APBApplyCounterLess25.comment: Number of all apply actuation with a slope between 20% and 25%

APBApplyCounterMore25.comment: Number of all apply actuation with a slope over 25%

APBReclampCounterOdo.comment: Number of reclamp actuation on Odometer condition

APBReclampCounterHTR.comment: Number of High Temperature Reclamp actuation
